title: Weather Toast
description: This is a Fabric mod, that displays toast notifications informing you of weather changes (toggleable).
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

_Deep down in the caves, ever wondered what the current weather is? Well, you came to the right place!_

**Weather Toast** is a client-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows you to see weather updates via **Toast Notifications**. Every time the weather changes, a Toast Notification appears, showing you the current weather in-game. The whole mod is toggleable with this command that the mod adds: **/toggleweatherupdates**.

For a visual of the mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or visit this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/weather-toast/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/G9HHNaUuX40" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**Why Download?**

If you are underground, knowing the weather can be hard. But with this mod, you will **recieve weather updates no matter where you are**!

<hr>

**Donation**

If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
